name: E2E reusable login create event
description: The reusable test user signs in, creates an event via the calendar dialog, verifies it, and deletes it

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Wait for 3 seconds for the dashboard and weekly calendar to load
Click on an empty time slot in the weekly calendar grid to open the event dialog
Type TestSprite Calendar Cleanup into the title input field labeled Judul Event in the event dialog
Click the 'Simpan Event' button in the event dialog
Wait for 3 seconds for the event to save and the dialog to close
Verify the weekly calendar grid shows an event block containing TestSprite Calendar Cleanup
Open TestSprite Calendar Cleanup, click Hapus, and confirm the browser deletion prompt
